package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for gin_context_copy_for_each_item_fanout: Gin handlers that call c.Copy() once per loop iteration before goroutine fanout.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule316NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule316NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule316NegativeRecord) (Rule316NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario316Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule316NegativeService, input Rule316NegativeRecord) (Rule316NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule316NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
